java.time/Clock/tick.name: tick
signatures: public static Clock tick(Clock baseClock, Duration tickDuration)
java.time/Clock/tick.description:
Obtains a clock that returns instants from the specified clock truncated
to the nearest occurrence of the specified duration.

info.excerpt:
Obtains a clock that returns instants from the specified clock truncated
to the nearest occurrence of the specified duration.

java.time/InstantSource/tick.name: tick
signatures: public static InstantSource tick(InstantSource baseSource, Duration tickDuration)
java.time/InstantSource/tick.description:
Obtains a source that returns instants from the specified source truncated to
the nearest occurrence of the specified duration.

info.excerpt:
Obtains a source that returns instants from the specified source truncated to
the nearest occurrence of the specified duration.

java.time/Clock/tickMillis.name: tickMillis
java.time/Clock/tickMillis.description:
Obtains a clock that returns the current instant ticking in whole milliseconds
using the best available system clock.

info.excerpt:
Obtains a clock that returns the current instant ticking in whole milliseconds
using the best available system clock.

java.time/Clock/tickMinutes.name: tickMinutes
java.time/Clock/tickMinutes.description:
Obtains a clock that returns the current instant ticking in whole minutes
using the best available system clock.

info.excerpt:
Obtains a clock that returns the current instant ticking in whole minutes
using the best available system clock.

java.time/Clock/tickSeconds.name: tickSeconds
java.time/Clock/tickSeconds.description:
Obtains a clock that returns the current instant ticking in whole seconds
using the best available system clock.

info.excerpt:
Obtains a clock that returns the current instant ticking in whole seconds
using the best available system clock.

java.time/OffsetDateTime/timeLineOrder.name: timeLineOrder
